info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: SudDyA snAnaM vruqanaM ca lakzyate ' iti kzIrasvAmI  vruqanam = saMvaraRam

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'AnABi niramajjaMSca raTacakrARi SoRite' (BA0 droRa0 14689) BfSaM nyamajjan
'sa pIqito giristena nirmamajja samantataH' (hari0 24282) jalodgamo'syABUdityarTaH pratiBAti
'dantolUKalinaScEva taTEvonmajjakAH pare' (rA0 363) unmajjakAH kaRWadaGnajale hemantezu sTitvA tapaH sADakAH
'upamaNkzyati syA (=sA pfTivI) salilasya maDye' (Sa0 brA0 137115) upamaNkzyati nimaNkzyati
